EEGPlacementScheme: 10-20 subset (F3, F4, C3, C4, O1, O2)
TaskDescription: Overnight clinical polysomnography for sleep apnea evaluation at Massachusetts General Hospital. Subjects slept naturally while 13 channels of PSG data were recorded. Test set — PSG signals only, no expert annotations.
InstitutionalDepartmentName: Computational Clinical Neurophysiology Laboratory (CCNL) and Clinical Data Animation Laboratory (CDAC)
